generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance AutonomousVehicleChassis : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis for steering and speed control in the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle, derived from Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium chassis"
]

instance JetsonOrinNanoOnboard : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Upper-level autonomy platform on the physical twin vehicle hosting NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for real-time processing of sensor fusion and actuation control"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Electronic speed controller interfacing with vehicle motors for speed regulation in the autonomous vehicle chassis"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Steering servo component for angle adjustments in the autonomous vehicle chassis"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR generating raw point clouds for object detection and tracking via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera providing 3D spatial data for environment perception and projected driving path visualization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance EgoVehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring vehicle speed transmitted via ROS2 topics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance EgoVehicleSteeringSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring steering angle transmitted via ROS2 topics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
    DTDFVocab:producedVia ROS2WiFiNetwork
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:producedVia ROS2WiFiNetwork
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleSpeedSensor
    DTDFVocab:producedVia ROS2WiFiNetwork
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleSteeringSensor
    DTDFVocab:producedVia ROS2WiFiNetwork
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:producedVia ROS2WiFiNetwork
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:producedVia ROS2WiFiNetwork
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance LiDARCameraFusionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model combining Hokuyo LiDAR point clouds and Intel Depth Camera data using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object detection and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant (Performance Class I) speed computation model implementing distance-based following logic for adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JetsonOrinNanoOnboard
]

instance ObjectTrackDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing position/velocity data of detected objects from LiDAR/camera fusion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing real-time ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ProjectedPathDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Database storing projected driving paths derived from sensor fusion and object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProjectedDrivingPathData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance TimeseriesReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries data collection of vehicle/object tracks for performance analysis and troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackDatabase, EgoVehicleStateDatabase
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CloudStorage
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware facilitating inter-component communication and inter-entity networking between physical twin and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer providing on-board processing capabilities for real-time sensor fusion and actuation control"
    DTDFVocab:enables LiDARCameraFusionModel, ACCControlModel
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK enabling middleware integration and hardware abstraction for the autonomous vehicle platform"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 programming language used for rapid prototyping of digital twin components and data processing pipelines"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, TroubleshootingService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language used for ROS2 node lifecycle management and performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2Middleware
]

instance CustomDataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom data translation feature engine handling serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment for inter-entity communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2WiFiNetwork
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Structured Query Language database system for storing and managing digital twin data collections"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackDatabase, EgoVehicleStateDatabase, TimeseriesReportData
]

instance CloudStorage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based storage system for generating and archiving digital twin reports and analytics"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimeseriesReportData
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service providing 3D visualization of ego vehicle state, detected object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization FE"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeEgoStateVisualization, ObjectTrackVisualization, ProjectedPathVisualization
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offloading ACC control logic (lead-vehicle detection, speed computation) from vehicle ECUs to cloud-based digital twin entity"
    DTDFVocab:provides CloudBasedACCControl, LatencyConstrainedActuation
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, trigger emergency braking, and generate reports via remote control panel"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlManagement, SpeedSetting, EmergencyBrakingTrigger, ReportGeneration
]

instance TroubleshootingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Developer-focused service using data collection and monitoring to debug system performance during development"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceDebugging, FaultDetection
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeEgoStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle speed and steering angle data for adaptive cruise control monitoring"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of detected object tracks derived from fused LiDAR and camera data for collision avoidance assessment"
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of projected driving paths based on sensor fusion and object tracking for path planning validation"
]

instance CloudBasedACCControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic speed computation and lead-vehicle tracking executed in cloud-based digital twin entity with on-board actuation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LatencyConstrainedActuation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "On-board motor/servo control loops executing actuation commands with end-to-end latency constrained to ≤100ms"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCControlManagement : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of adaptive cruise control system via digital twin user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedSetting : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote configuration of desired cruise control speed through digital twin control panel"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingTrigger : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command sent from digital twin UI to physical twin vehicle for safety intervention"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of timeseries reports containing vehicle/object tracking data for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PerformanceDebugging : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Developer analysis of ACC system performance metrics (speed deviations, tracking errors) for parameter tuning"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance FaultDetection : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking triggers indicating potential hardware/software faults (sensor drift, control system issues)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Physical Twin Entity
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical twin vehicle entity hosting on-board processing (Jetson Orin Nano) for sensor fusion, actuation, and real-time control"
    base:contains AutonomousVehicleChassis, JetsonOrinNanoOnboard, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo, HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera
]

// C13: Digital Twin Entity
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cloud-based digital twin entity handling data collection, reporting, and ACC control logic offloading"
    base:contains ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetpack5, Python38, CPlusPlus, SQLDatabase, CloudStorage
]

// C14: User Entity
instance UserInterfaceEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Single UI instance combining 3D visualization and control panel for operators/developers interacting with the digital twin"
    base:contains DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService, TroubleshootingService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends control commands to the physical twin via:
  - **ROS2 network**: Actuation commands (e.g., motor voltage for speed control, steering servo adjustments) are generated by the **Actuation FE** and transmitted back to the vehicle’s Jetson Orin Nano.
  - **Wi-Fi network**: Remote management commands (e.g., ACC enable/disable, desired speed adjustment, emergency braking) are routed from the DT’s **Control Panel UI FE** to the vehicle’s onboard system.
  - **Latency-critical paths**: All virtual-to-physical interactions adhere to ≤100 ms latency requirements for real-time ACC operation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time, event-driven time scale**:
  - **Data collection rate**: LiDAR point clouds processed at ~10–20 Hz (DBSCAN/Kalman filtering), ego vehicle state updated every perception cycle (~10–50 Hz).
  - **Latency constraints**: End-to-end latency between vehicle and DT Entity ≤100 ms (3GPP V2V specification).
  - **Synchronization**: Clock synchronization accuracy of ≤100 ms (critical for distributed systems and event ordering)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized into **three primary entities** (ISO 23247 RA adapted for automotive):
  1. **Physical Twin Entity**:
     - Hosts on-board resources (sensors, actuators, Jetson Orin Nano).
     - Implements:
       - **Data Pre-Processing FE**: LiDAR point cloud processing.
       - **Actuation FE**: Motor/servo control commands.
       - **Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE**: DBSCAN/Kalman filtering.
  2. **Digital Twin Entity**:
     - Cloud-based component handling:
       - **Data Collection FE**: Object/vehicle state collection.
       - **Reporting FE**: Timeseries report generation.
       - **Controlling FE**: ACC logic (lead-vehicle detection, speed computation).
  3. **User Entity**:
     - Single UI instance with:
       - **3D Visualization FE**: Real-time rendering of ego vehicle/objects.
       - **Control Panel FE**: Remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, set speed, emergency braking).
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used for cyber-physical experimentation (simulator integration with 3D CAD/Simulink for ACC validation).
  - **Manufacturing Phase**: Not directly applicable (physical twin is a retrofitted prototype).
  - **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance (e.g., emergency braking, ACC tuning) during vehicle operation.
  The DT covers the **operated-as** phase of the physical twin, focusing on real-time performance validation and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**:
    - **ACC Control**: ISO 15622-compliant (Performance Class I) for safety-critical following logic.
    - **Latency**: End-to-end latency ≤100 ms (3GPP V2V specification).
    - **Clock Synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy for distributed systems.
  - **Validation**:
    - **Real-time Performance**: Tested on 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle with LiDAR/camera fusion.
    - **Data Accuracy**: Object tracks derived from DBSCAN/Kalman filtering (ground truth via manual inspection).
    - **Uncertainty Handling**: No explicit uncertainty quantification mentioned; reliance on sensor fusion algorithms (e.g., Kalman filter assumptions)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections between PT and DT:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - **On-board**: ROS2 (ROS 2.0) for intra-vehicle communication.
    - **Inter-entity**: Wi-Fi (UDP-based) for cloud-to-vehicle data transfer.
  - **Latency Constraints**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP V2V spec).
  - **Data Serialization**: Custom **Data Translation FE** ensures message type alignment and unit conversions (e.g., LiDAR coordinates to ROS2 topics)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **cloud-based system** with on-board components:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosted on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (on-vehicle processing).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Cloud-based (external to vehicle), running on NVIDIA Jetson NX (for real-time processing).
  - **User Entity**: Single UI instance accessible via web interface (3D visualization + control panel).
  - **Data Storage**: External SQL database (not on-vehicle) for historical data (object tracks, vehicle state)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Systems**: Not explicitly detailed in documents; assumed to use ROS2-based middleware for inter-DT communication (if applicable).
  - **Vehicle Data Systems**: Ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) is shared with other ADAS systems (e.g., collision avoidance) via ROS2 topics."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture adapted for automotive DTs (Physical Twin Entity introduced).
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) control logic (Performance Class I).
  - **3GPP 22.185**: Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication latency requirements (≤100 ms).
  - **ROS2**: Robot Operating System 2 for middleware communication.
  - **OPC UA**: Mentioned as a potential implementation for Data Translation FE (not used in this case study)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety-Critical Paths**:
    - **Latency**: ≤100 ms end-to-end for ACC actuation (3GPP V2V spec).
    - **Clock Synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy for distributed systems.
    - **Hardware Isolation**: On-board processing (Jetson Orin Nano) separated from cloud-based DT Entity.
  - **Remote Operations**:
    - Emergency braking commands are validated before execution (no direct human-in-the-loop for critical actions).
    - **Human-in-the-Loop**: Operators can disable ACC or override commands remotely (but not autonomously trigger accidents).
  - **Data Security**: No explicit mention of encryption/access controls; assumed to follow automotive cybersecurity best practices (e.g., TLS for Wi-Fi communication)."
]
